tools.name: get_cv
tools.description: Returns Felipe Tavares' CV as a JSON Resume document (jsonresume.org schema).

tools.name: get_profile
tools.description: Returns Felipe's positioning statement, 12 domains of expertise, and public contact links.

tools.name: search_content
tools.description: Lexical (BM25) full-text search over every published page on felipetavares.dev.

tools.name: get_page
tools.description: Returns the markdown content of a site page by path (static paths or /projects/<slug>, /writing/<slug>).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Lists all projects with metadata: slug, title, tagline, status, stack, and links.

tools.name: list_articles
tools.description: Lists all published articles with metadata: slug, title, description, tags, and dates.

tools.name: ask_felipe
tools.description: Natural-language Q&A grounded in site content via retrieval-augmented LLM. Rate-limited: 10 calls/hour.

tools.name: leave_message
tools.description: Sends a plain-text email to Felipe on an agent user's behalf. Rate-limited: 3 calls/day.
